description_long: This is a decorative garden gate integrated into a picket fence, featuring a central arched entryway with a swinging gate. The structure is primarily composed of vertical metal pickets with pointed tops, supported by horizontal rails and a base that appears to mimic brick or stone. The arch above the gate is adorned with ornamental scrollwork and possibly some green vine-like detailing, adding a touch of elegance and natural charm. The gate itself is hinged and includes a simple latch mechanism for manual operation. The entire assembly is symmetrical, with the gate positioned centrally between two equal-length fence sections. The materials and design suggest it is intended for use in residential gardens, parks, or similar urban green spaces.
description: A decorative metal garden gate with an arched top and ornamental scrollwork, set within a picket fence on a brick-like base. The gate features a central swinging entry and is flanked by symmetrical fence sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched gate, ornamental scrollwork, and symmetrical picket fence sections on a brick-like base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the gate and fence, with the arch and scrollwork visible in silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the arched gate, scrollwork, and picket fence details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the arch structure from the side.
